description: Super App PWA para digitalizar la experiencia de la Guelaguetza de Oaxaca

stack.frontend: React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS v3 (build-time via PostCSS)

features: AR Vitrina 3D: 21 modelos (12 Premium + 9 TRELLIS) con AR nativo
QR-to-AR: ruta directa /#/ar/{modelId} sin login para turistas
Admin QR panel: generar/imprimir QR codes para puntos físicos
testsStatus: 348 pass, 0 fail (6 test files skip — Playwright/Vitest config conflict)
knownIssues: SmartMapView and SellerDashboard are 100% mock data — no API connection

Some dead test files reference removed components (VestimentasView, AlebrijeView)
